findings.description: Heading hierarchy does not accurately reflect the document structure. The main document title block from the PDF is not marked as a top-level heading, and section labels that appear as underlined inline headings in the PDF are converted to h2 elements without a corresponding h1.
findings.evidence:
PDF title block: "FACT SHEET / DRAFT PERMIT RENEWAL / Safety-Kleen Archdale / 6182 Old Mendenhall Road / Archdale, North Carolina / EPA ID Number: NCD 077 840 148". HTML renders this in a

...

rather than a heading, while "Background" and "Public Comment & Public Hearing" are rendered as

.
